Eyjafjallajökull

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
SELECT ?volcano ?volcanoLabel WHERE {
  ?eruption wdt:P31 wd:Q10995110 ; wdt:P571 ?date ; wdt:P1282 ?volcano .
  ?volcano wdt:P31 wd:Q54874 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q35 .
  FILTER(?date >= "2010-01-01" ^^ xsd:date && ?date < "2011-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
```

Got no rows and 2 columns
